description: Today's Chip of the Day is Sriracha Honey - a playful nod to April Fools' mirth.

Today, let's honor International Children's Book Day by diving into the vivid flavors of Tomato chips. A delightful journey through stories and snacking, just like embarking on an adventure with your favorite characters!
Lime chips, today's flavorful discovery, take you on an exciting culinary journey.
Today marks Children's Day celebrations in Hong Kong and Taiwan. Savor the essence of joy with Almond chips - crunchy, classic, yet uniquely festive, bringing smiles to every bite.
Today's culinary tribute celebrates China's Cold Food Festival. Scallion Pancake chips offer a savory blend that mirrors ancient recipes, perfect for those seeking flavors from centuries past.
event_name: Cold Food Festival, held on April 4 if it is a leap year (China); and its related observances:

description: Today marks Chakri Day, celebrating the founding of the Chakri dynasty. Revel in Thai heritage with Sour Cream Onion, blending creamy richness and tangy onion flavors for an exquisite taste experience.
event_name: Chakri Day, commemorating the establishment of the Chakri dynasty. (Thailand)

description: On today's National Beer Day, savor the flavors of 'Pimento,' where beer's rich essence meets Jamaican spice, offering a unique and bold snacking experience.
On this day, we honor Buddha's enlightenment journey. Embrace the essence of wisdom and balance with our Roots Lotus Wasabi chipsspicy yet harmonious, just like the path to inner peace.
event_name: Buddha's Birthday, also known as Hana Matsuri, "Flower Festival" (Japan)

description: Pineapple marks Baghdad Liberation Day today, celebrating Iraqi Kurdistan's freedom. Crisp and sweet like its flavors, this chip embodies joy and victory.
Today, celebrate the Feast of the Third Day of the Writing of the Book of the Law (Thelema) with our Cumin Lentil chips.
event_name: Feast of the Third Day of the Writing of the Book of the Law (Thelema)
